;<span id="Spreading_activation">spreading activation</span>
:method of activating nodes in a neural network, semantic network, directed graph, etc. In [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]], the graph is formed by semantic connections of the [[Glossary:Knowledge_tree|knowledge tree]], [[Glossary:Link|concept links and inter-element links]]. '''Spreading activation''' is used to sequence [[Glossary:Element|elements]] for [[Glossary:Neural_review|neural review]]. This is a new form of semantic review in [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]], where new [[Glossary:Element|elements]] are fed ''neurally'' for review. This approach is useful in enhancing creativity and problem solving. To get a taste of [[Glossary:Neural_review|neural review]] choose '''[[Learn menu|Learn]] : [[Learn menu#Go neural|Go neural]]''' (''Ctrl+F2'') from the [[main menu]]. For more, see Wikipedia: [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spreading_activation Spreading activation]
